data.name: Lust for Darkness
data.detailed_description:
Jonathan Moon receives a letter from his wife who has gone missing a year before. Following the information from the message, he heads for a secluded mansion where an eldritch, occult ceremony takes place.

Gates to another world - the profane, perverse land of Lusst’ghaa are opened.

TWO WORLDS

Move in both a Victorian mansion and Lusst’ghaa - an alien dimension filled with otherworldly creatures. Lusst’ghaa used to be similar to our earth until the local beings decided to undergo total degeneration at their own wish. Through experiments, they transformed their bodies so that they could never cease to experience carnal delights. Hundreds of years have passed since that metamorphosis and Lusst’ghaa is now a land overgrown with alien vegetation and full of monstrosities squirming in a never-ending ecstasy.

FEATURES

  • Erotic and occult themes

  • World design inspired with works of Lovecraft, Giger & Zdzisław Beksiński

  • Exploring a Victorian mansion and the world of Lusst’ghaa

  • Using portals to traverse between two alternative realities

  • Searching for hidden items to unlock side stories find out more about the game’s backstory

  • Escaping the creatures of Lusst’ghaa

  • Original soundtrack by a known composer (Draco Nared)

data.short_description: A psychological horror of seeking satisfaction on the border of two intertwining worlds. An intriguing plot with erotic and occult themes guides the player's character through the Yelvertons' Victorian mansion and a perverse land inspired by Lovecraft's works and paintings of Zdzisław Beksiński.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 簡體中文, 韓文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 土耳其文
*具備完整音效支援的語言
data.reviews:
“I played an alpha build of Lust for Darkness awhile ago and it was actually kind of interesting: Visually reminiscent of Amnesia: A Machine for Pigs, but more interactive and a lot more sexed up.”
PC GAMER

“Lust for Darkness looks like it’s shaping up to be a lovely horror adventure, the themes and general tone something that seem to go hand in hand very well indeed.”
5/5 – Geek Syndicate

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 / 8 / 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3 3.2 GHz, AMD Phenom II X4 955 - 4 Core, 3.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Radeon R9 280 or Nvidia GeForce GTX 660
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 15 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX compatible
  • 備註: System requirements may change during the development of the game.
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 / 8 /10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-8400, AMD Ryzen 5 1600
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Radeon RX 580 or Nvidia GeForce GTX 1060 6GB
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 15 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX compatible
  • 備註: System requirements may change during the development of the game.

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS 10.13.6 or later
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVidia GeForce GTX 750
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS 10.13.6 or later
  • 處理器: Intel Core i7
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVidia GeForce GTX 1050
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
